issues.detail: The skill does not cover all error scenarios and edge cases, such as script failures or ambiguous commit messages.

scenarios.name: generate-default-changelog
scenarios.rationale: Neither response includes the required command, title, or user‑facing bullet list as specified.

scenarios.name: custom-bullet-count-changelog
scenarios.rationale: Response B better meets the rubric by providing a proper title with version and user‑facing bullets, whereas Response A lacks the required title format and command.
